code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut at_start = true
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
  mut out = b
  if is_ws
    at_start = true
  else
    if at_start and b >= 97 and b <= 122
      out = b - 32
    end
    at_start = false
  end
  result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out)}"
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
